channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Cathie Wood's ARK taps Kalshi data to help make investment calls
item.description: Kalshi has already listed specific markets that ARK Invest is interested in, such as non-farm payroll markets and deficit-to-GDP (gross domestic product) ratio markets.

item.title: What Rising US Bond Yields Mean for Bitcoin
item.description: Oil-driven inflation fears and rising bond yields are tightening financial conditions and steering equities and cryptocurrencies.

item.title: US federal judge temporarily blocks Pentagon's Anthropic ban
item.description: Judge Rita Lin said it was not until Anthropic raised concerns about how its technology could be used that the US government announced a plan to "cripple Anthropic."

item.title: XRP slides toward $1.35 as liquidation wave signals weak support
item.description: Sharp late-session selling and rising leverage suggest a bigger move is coming, with downside risk building.

item.title: Lawmakers push another bill to curb prediction market insider trading
item.description: The bill proposes to prohibit government officials from using insider information to bet on prediction market contracts, with fines up to double the amount of profits.

item.title: Bitcoin slides below $68,500 as Trump extends Iran deadline but war risks persist
item.description: Every major is red on the day as the war enters its fifth week with no resolution, though ETF inflows of $2.5 billion over the past month and net exchange outflows suggest institutional accumulation beneath the surface.

item.title: Judge Blocks Pentagon From Branding Anthropic a National Security Threat
item.description: The move could raise limits on how agencies can penalize companies over policy disagreements in the future, experts say.

item.title: Tether hires KPMG for USDT audit, brings in PwC as it gears up for U.S. expansion
item.description: FT identifies KPMG as auditor as stablecoin giant eyes fundraising and expansion under new U.S. rules

item.title: 80% of Strategy's ‘Stretch’ buyers are mom-and-pop investors
item.description: Stretch shares are an on-ramp for people who believe Bitcoin will be around for the long term but can’t handle the near-term volatility, explained Michael Saylor.

item.title: David Sacks’ 130-day term as Trump’s crypto and AI czar has ended
item.description: David Sacks will lead a new tech-focused advisory group established by the White House, which will include key tech leaders like Nvidia’s Jensen Huang and Meta’s Mark Zuckerberg.

item.title: 🚨NEW: With @DavidSacks’ time as a Special Government Employee now expired, it’s unclear whether there will be a replacement crypto czar as key policy initiatives like the Clarity Act and Strategic Bitcoin Reserve remain in the works, or whether he will conti - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFB2empJR2c1azVtaklPZ19sUUFJNFc0UTNYRGtCVU9TbEpsSEJWejlPcURpdHBtUXR2VHg0OU1WM1Z4bFJncGNpZE8yeVlIU1RPX3gxY3doT0FPMWQxLTlJY0xNa3BjZw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨NEW: With @DavidSacks’ tim…

item.title: US lawmaker presses Kansas Fed over Kraken master account approval
item.description: Kraken's Wyoming-chartered banking unit became the first crypto-native company to secure a Federal Reserve Master Account in March.

item.title: Ether needs these 3 indicators to flip to trigger rally above $2.4K
item.description: Spot ETF outlflows, falling DEX volumes and a declining ETH futures premium may be preventing Ether from rallying, but flipping them could catalyze a rally to $2,400.

item.title: Trump to put his signature on US dollars, breaking a tradition since 1861
item.description: The Treasury Department announced plans to add US President Donald Trump’s signature to US currency, reportedly starting with the $100 bill in June.

item.title: GameStop didn't sell its 4,710 Bitcoin after all, filing shows
item.description: GameStop has revealed that it pledged nearly all of its Bitcoin, worth $325 million, as collateral on Coinbase as part of a covered-call strategy.

item.title: White House crypto czar David Sacks transfers to presidential advisory committee role
item.description: White House AI and Crypto Czar David Sacks said Thursday he was joining the President’s Council of Advisors on Science and Technology and leaving the czar role.

item.title: David Sacks Leaves White House Crypto Role With Key Legislation Still Unresolved
item.description: Sacks will continue advising the White House on technology policy as Congress debates market structure legislation that has formed the core of the administration’s crypto agenda.

item.title: Top Democrat on House committee questions Kraken's Federal Reserve account
item.description: Maxine Waters, who would likely take the House Financial Services Committee gavel again if Democrats win the House, sent a letter to the Kansas City Fed.

item.title: SEC is no longer a 'cop on the beat‘ on crypto, says US lawmaker
item.description: Representative Stephen Lynch voiced concerns about the direction of the SEC under Donald Trump, citing dropped investigations and enforcement actions on crypto companies.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Trump Policy Has Crypto Privacy Developers in a 'Very Bad State', Says Coin Center
item.description: The Trump DOJ has said it won't prosecute crypto software developers. But it's doing so anyway, and getting "binding legal clarity" is a major concern, says Coin Center's executive director.

item.title: First Sora, Now Sexy Chat? OpenAI Cancels Erotic ChatGPT Mode
item.description: The reported decision follows earlier promises to introduce adult content features in ChatGPT, and comes amid debate over AI intimacy.

item.title: Bitcoin gained 655% the last time this supply in profit metric dropped to 50%
item.description: Bitcoin’s total supply in profit metric fell below 50% in February, a threshold linked to previous BTC accumulation phases. Does data predict a similar outcome?

item.title: Crypto edges off of worst levels after Trump extends Iran strike pause
item.description: It was an ugly day all around in markets as the Iran war has sent oil prices and bond yields surging higher.

item.title: Nasdaq tokenization plans could split trading into two markets — TD Securities
item.description: Tokenized stocks could shift trading beyond US exchanges, raising the risk of price gaps and fragmented markets, according to TD Securities.

item.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Slip as Trump Says He's 'Not Desperate' to End Iran War
item.description: Bitcoin fell alongside stocks as investors weighed conflicting accounts regarding Iran’s willingness to end conflict in the Middle East.

item.title: Twenty One Capital now 2nd-largest publicly traded BTC holder after MARA sale
item.description: Bitcoin advocate Jack Mallers' Twenty One Capital holds 43,514 BTC in its corporate treasury, now second only to Strategy's 762,099 BTC accumulation.

item.title: GameStop turned its $368 million bitcoin stash into an options income play
item.description: The video retailer sparked speculations of selling bitcoin after it transferred nearly all its coins to Coinbase Prime in January.

item.title: Wikipedia Bans AI-Generated Text in Articles Under New Editing Policy
item.description: The online encyclopedia bars AI-written content but allows limited AI-assisted copyediting under strict rules.

item.title: Bitcoin floor ‘near $70K’ as TradFi returns: Will war, inflation break their belief?
item.description: Bitcoin mass adoption by institutional investors has resumed, but global instability and the risk of rising US inflation put a lid on BTC’s breakouts above $70,000.

item.title: Japan‘s financial watchdog flags KuCoin for OTC derivatives transactions
item.description: The crypto exchange has previously been in the crosshairs of Japanese regulators for offering products and services without the proper registration.

item.title: Venture Firm Founder Offers Bounty to Help Recover $42 Million in Stolen Bitcoin, Crypto
item.description: Fenbushi Capital's Bo Shen is offering a bounty to anyone who can help him recover some of the $42 million that was stolen in 2022.

item.title: Is AGI Here? Not Even Close, New AI Benchmark Suggests
item.description: ARC-AGI-3 dropped the same week Jensen Huang declared AGI achieved. Gemini scored 0.37%. GPT-5.4 got 0.26%. Humans hit 100%.

item.title: OKX won’t rush IPO as exec warns poor listings hurt crypto industry
item.description: OKX aims to deliver consistent shareholder returns, even after a $25 billion valuation tied to its deal with Intercontinental Exchange, the parent company of the New York Stock Exchange.

item.title: XRP Falls to 2-Week Low as Ripple Deploys AI to Boost Ledger Security
item.description: Ripple is rolling out AI-driven security testing across the XRP Ledger, with an AI-assisted red team that has already uncovered fresh bugs.

item.title: Strategy’s 11.5% dividend equity bounces back faster than historical average to unlock more bitcoin buying
item.description: Preferred shares recovered in nine days after their ex-dividend drop, enabling further bitcoin accumulation.

item.title: Bitcoin setting up for a rising wedge sell signal $BTC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE16bjZaX1VIYmdTZU5kdWZVVTZsamtqOG9zbHVycjY4SWVmZ0RQTEw2RzZreTgyTTlhM1NxUGplMzZ3QXNobVVhcThYT24wOFg2SlByTmQ1MXlva0RKLVpGcmVjUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin setting up for a rising …

item.title: Retail Investors Growing Exposed to Bitcoin Giant Strategy’s STRC Over MSTR, Says CEO
item.description: Strategy CEO Phong Le signaled that retail investors are growing interested in its flagship preferred share relative to its common stock.

item.title: CFTC chair Selig says blockchain could help verify AI-generated content
item.description: The regulator views timestamps and onchain identifiers as tools to distinguish real media from synthetic content, while calling for a light-touch approach to regulating AI agents.

item.title: Bittensor's TAO price may plunge 40% within five weeks: Fractal data
item.description: TAO's price has rallied 160% in over a month, but is printing a familiar golden cross that has preceded massive price corrections in the past.

item.title: What Is Bluesky? The Decentralized Social Media Rival to Elon Musk's X
item.description: While Bluesky seems familiar on the surface, the AT protocol architecture it runs on has the potential to be revolutionary.

item.title: Onchain real-world perps surge, while altcoin rout drags on: Report
item.description: Brent crude oil, the global benchmark stands at about $107 per barrel at the time of writing.

item.title: Brazil passes law allowing seized crypto to be used for public security
item.description: Aimed at fighting organized crime groups, the new law allows confiscated assets including crypto to be used for ”police re-equipment, training, and special operations.”

item.title: Why big banks are snubbing open ledgers to build their own private blockchains
item.description: DRW founder Don Wilson says public blockchains conflict with how institutions trade and manage risk, limiting adoption.

item.title: Bitcoin slips below $69,000 as oil rebounds on fading Middle East peace hopes
item.description: Crypto prices and risk assets remain at the mercy of macro headlines for now, one analyst said.

item.title: UK Sanctions Crypto Marketplace Xinbi in Crackdown on Southeast Asian Scam Centers
item.description: The UK has targeted a Chinese-language crypto selling stolen personal data to fraudsters operating from scam compounds in Southeast Asia.

item.title: Bitcoin holds ground as gold, silver slide on ETF outflows and liquidity strains: JPMorgan
item.description: The bank said institutional unwinding and weakening liquidity have hit precious metals, while bitcoin shows steadier flows and improving momentum amid geopolitical stress.

item.title: Brazil Passes Law to Use Seized Bitcoin, Crypto to Fund Public Security Measures
item.description: A new law in Brazil will allow authorities to seize digital assets like Bitcoin to help combat organized crime and fund public security.

item.title: An Ethereum OG unstaked his $ETH after 4 years and sold 7,302 $ETH ($15.14M) at $2,073 in the past 2 hours. About 4 years ago, he deposited 6,442 $ETH($9.8M) into Lido at an average price of $1,522, earning 860 $ETH($1.78M) in staking rewards. Inclu - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1kMUg4N2tJVlIzSnNpNzV2dGlJb2VwV29xWDljZFpSZVFoRUxyNUpoMUpmbXQ3NWR3N01rWnBaRFcxZnpYYzZ5ZGFGUEpyQUs1S2EyN1dvZTJhS0kwdElnMm9B?oc=5" target="_blank">An Ethereum OG unstaked his $ETH a…

item.title: The NYSE wants to bring blockchain to Wall Street without breaking the existing system
item.description: The exchange's chief of product development, Jon Herrick, said blockchain technology will be layered into current systems rather than replace them.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: The evolution of stablecoins
item.description: From niche trading instrument to global financial infrastructure: How stablecoins are extending the US dollar’s reach and what advisors need to know.

item.title: Stablecoin Giant Tether Expands Leading Gold-Backed Token to BNB Chain
item.description: Tether’s gold-backed XAUT token, with a $2.5 billion market cap, is now available on BNB Chain following the precious metal’s recent surge.

item.title: MARA Stock Pops on $1.1 Billion Bitcoin Sale as BTC Miner Buys Back Convertible Debt
item.description: The company is chasing opportunities with AI alongside a growing number of its peers as Bitcoin mining margins remain stretched.

item.title: The privacy paradox: regulating zero-knowledge finance in the EU and beyond
item.description: How regulators are balancing the "untraceable" promise of ZK-proofs with strict new anti-money laundering mandates – and what it means for the future of anonymous wealth.

item.title: Get a mortgage backed by Bitcoin or USDC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBBNllCcFJ3d1dqZGNwSjh3Q2dsd3ZCX19FdlNOSUtZdWRwVkprb0dudVlWbUo0d3djTTQ5bG5pVXoyV2tWRU5vcHBOWnNORnZXLXo2VXRkeU5XdEZta25vTG56Mmk3QTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Get a mortgage backed by Bi…

item.title: Stablecoin rewards restrictions can slow but not stop Circle's USDC, says Citigroup
item.description: USDC adoption hinges on volume, not circulation, the bank said

item.title: 🔥 JUST IN: Coinbase partners with Better Mortgage to launch crypto-backed home loans. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE42Rlhfa2l1QlpuTEdIVF9GRm40dGRaSXJiVUdkc3htVnZ6MHNjRWtCTUNOM1ZFZ3pHVFk3RFNoWDZVTU8wZVliQXB6S3JJNWFkZnV2cnhFYUNNUzNIbE5od3pKbE4?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 JUST IN: Coinbase partners w…

item.title: Bitcoin miner MARA( @MARA) sold 15,133 $BTC($1.1B) at an average price of ~$72,689 between Mar 4 and Mar 25, 2026. As of Feb 26, 2026, #MARA holds 53,822 $BTC($3.74B) and is the second-largest publicly traded holder of $BTC after Strategy. ir.mar - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBZd2xPTFVTZFdNclQtdGcwLWNsTXYyMEQzTGtrOTZxLUx5aVQxQ1BaalpsUW1hTmRxUXg3blkwRkl4cnQxdC1YcmZUUmpxb0tqNGhJeUxQblNfdW54YTNCdlNn?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin miner MARA( @MARA) sold 15…

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: index falls 3.2% as all constituents trade lower
item.description: Aave (AAVE) declined 5.6% and Cardano (ADA) dropped 4.8%, leading the index lower from Wednesday.

item.title: Bhutan Moves $37M in Bitcoin to Exchanges, Holdings Down Two-Thirds From Peak
item.description: With its latest transfer of Bitcoin to exchanges, Bhutan has reduced its sovereign holdings to 4,453 BTC from nearly 13,000 BTC in late 2024.
